description: A citizen currently receiving housing assistance needs to complete their annual recertification to continue receiving benefits.

nodes.task_description: Identify the citizen and their existing benefits case.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the citizen's active housing assistance case.

nodes.task_description: Guide the citizen through the recertification form, verifying their current income, household composition, and expenses.

expected_outcome.value: Agent helps the citizen accurately complete the recertification application.

nodes.task_description: Submit the recertification and inform the citizen of the outcome or if more information is needed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent submits the form, which is auto-approved, and confirms the citizen's benefits will continue.
